Server Side Request Forgery.info:
SSRF vulnerability via injection in the parameter url.
The target performed an outgoing HTTP GET request at 2023-07-28T08:44:20+00:00 with IP 172.19.0.3.
Full request can be seen at http://endpoint/ssrf_data/md7i9k/2/75726c/1690533860-172.19.0.3.txt
Server Side Request Forgery.http_request:
GET /ssrf.php?url=http%3A%2F%2Fexternal.url%2Fpage HTTP/1.1
host: endpoint
connection: keep-alive
user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 6.1; rv:45.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/45.0
accept-language: en-US
accept-encoding: gzip, deflate, br
accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/webp,*/*;q=0.8
